heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1455 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2005 through 2010.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1455, , as added , , , set out minimum State grant amounts, prior to the general amendment of subchapters I to IV of this chapter by .Pub.
